channel.title: i love grape
channel.description: A simple yet classy theme for your Jekyll website or blog.

item.title: Pymol tutorial 1 : open source pymol install
item.description:
pymol

python 기반의 분자 구조 뷰어 프로그램

prerequest

anaconda3 openbabel (openbabel 미설치시 pymol 설치 안되는 문제 존재)

install code

conda install -c conda-forge pymol-open-source

exec

anaconda...

item.title: Welcome to Jekyll!
item.description: You’ll find this post in your _posts directory. Go ahead and edit it and re-build the site to see your changes. You can rebuild the site in many different...
